/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -march=armv9-a+sve2 -O2 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wvla -Wformat=2 -Wformat-security -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -fstack-protector-strong -g -O0 -g3 -DDEBUG -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_chacha20poly1305.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_chacha20poly1305.dir/test_chacha20poly1305.c.o -o ../../bin/test_chacha20poly1305  ../../lib/libama_cryptography_test.a
